name: arbor
description: Maintain project-local Arbor memory and run structured Arbor workflow skills from intake through release finalization.

interface.longDescription: Arbor initializes project-local memory, registers project-level Codex hook intents, loads startup context in a stable order, emits memory hygiene packets, emits AGENTS drift packets, classifies user requests for Arbor-managed development workflow, turns Arbor-managed requests into reviewable brainstorm plans, executes authorized develop units with developer self-test and review handoff evidence, independently evaluates completed develop handoffs, decides convergence, and internally finalizes release evidence before selecting the next feature.
defaultPrompt: Resume this repo with Arbor context
Plan and run an Arbor-managed feature
